Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd (Executor).

Ms. Engh explained services provided/time spent in the litigation matter and stated that almost nothing was ordinary in this case. The Petition for Allowance of Attorney Fees and the Petition for Final Distribution were taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Ms. Engh also stated that she will file a petition for extraordinary fees.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate/Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Oct-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For A Determination That Other Property Belongs To The Probate Estate Pursant To Cpc Sec. 850 And For Sanctions.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Petitioner. Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd.

The Petition for A Determination That Other Property Belongs to The Probate Estate Pursuant to CCP Sec. 850 and For Sanctions was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court). The Court does not see why if they were able to come to a settlement, they can not petition for approval of the settlement agreement with notice to everyone so that they can object if desired so that there objections can be considered. Status on close of the Estate which is set for September 4, 2012 was continued to October 31, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Andrade.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd. James Bridgman for and with Jesse Byrd.

The accounting petition was taken under submission. Mr. Bridgman will file something to bring the issue of other properties/assets being part of the probate Estate. Status on close of the Estate/petition for final distribution was set for September 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Erlinda Byrd'S Accounting And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd (Executor). James Bridgman for Laura Byrd, Jessie Byrd, Ruby Sturgisna nd Alberta McFadden.

Ms. Engh stated that the accounting was filed today with no hearing date. The Court advised Ms. Engh that it needs to be a petition for approval of the accounting with a Notice of Hearing and that it needs a hearing date. Status on Erlinda Byrd's accounting was continued to January 31, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of close of the Estate was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Text Ruling

Petition For Judicial Intervention As Executor Has Failed To Properly Administer Estat
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Aspelin for and with Alberta McFadden and Jessie Byrd and for Laura Byrd. Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd (Surviving Spouse/Executor). Michelle DuPaty in Propria Persona. David Byrd in Propria Persona. Danica Du Paty in Propria Persona.

The Petition for Judicial Intervention was denied without prejudice as the petition was not brought under the correct probate code. The Court stated that either a Petition for Final Distribution or an 850 Petition was needed and that this matter needs to be brought to a close. The Court approved the status report. Status of close of the estate was set for January 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Continued To Aug-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Engh for Erlinda Byrd (Executor). Michelle DuPaty (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona. Danica DuPaty (Grandaughter of Decedent) in Propira Persona.

Ms. Engh stated that they had a comprehensive accounting and settlement in August of last year, that 60% of the Heirs accepted the settlement, that her Client wants only one settlement and that they are proceeding to make a settlement with each of the Heirs. The Court expressed concern about Counsel entering into partial settlement and the length of time of which the Estate has been pending. Michelle DuPaty stated that she was filing a petition for the Court to make a ruling on the matter, that she and her Brother were not involved in the settlement, that several properties were not included in the Estate, that there is an issue of a $450,000.00 loan of which she would like half of that amount put back into the Estate, that the accounting was not acceptable and that Ms. Byrd is not willing to provide records. Ms. Engh stated that she would be happy to go forward and close the Estate based on the current assets and that she preferred not bringing the matter to trial. The accounting petition was continued to August 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (same hearing date on Ms. DuPaty's petition). The Court stated that the matter needs to be brought to trial, encouraged Ms. DuPaty to tell all of the Heirs that the Court is interested in bringing the matter to conclusion, and suggested the Heirs get together and have Counsel represent them. The Court will look at the issue of the complaint filed in 2005.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-07-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Leon Ainer appearing for petitioners. Mr. & Mrs. Byrd are in court. Elizabeth Engh appearing for Erlilnda Byrd. Mr. Ainer still wanted out. Mr. Byrd planned to get another attorney. Mr. & Mrs. Byrd requested to talk to the Court in chambers. Court agreed to talk to them in chambers at the end of the calendar. Ms. Engh agreed to wait.

At 11:15am. All parties returned to court. The Court had discussion in chambers with Mr. & Mrs. Byrd and Mr. Ainer also Ms. Engh. Court was told that there are 40 heirs involved. 38 of them have agreed to the settlement agreement. Ms. Engh has indicated that she did not have her client's phone number with her. She will call her with Mr.& Mrs. Byrd's offer. Ms. Engh will let the Court know before 5 o'clock today. In the event that her client not accepting the offer or have a counter offer, Court will set a further hearing date for the two heirs who have not responded to come to court. Court purposted to treat their lack of showing as default. Their share will be placed in a trust for those non-appearing people. Mrs. Byrd asked for clarification on the heirs. They are the parties who participated with mediation. Court will relieve Mr. Ainer as counsel except if the offer is accepted or a counter offer is made and accepted. He is to put it in writing. Ms. Engh can give the counter offer to the Court. Mr. Byrd's phone number is 415-239-6430. Mr. Ainer's office number is 408-777-0776 and his mobile number is 510-599-0748.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
